component.name: Bitcoin Safe
component.summary: A desktop software for managing your cold storage wallets

description.p: Bitcoin Safe is a bitcoin savings wallet focused on family-friendly multisig setup, hardware signers, and long-term self-custody.
It supports USB, QR, and SD-card hardware wallet workflows, guided setup, PDF backups, transaction visualization, and synchronized labels across devices.
Compact Block Filters are now the default network option, with a migration notification for existing users. PR #559, PR #626 Big thanks to @rustaceanrob
The wallet setup flow has been rebuilt for a clearer and more polished onboarding experience together with @design-rrr . PR #627
The signing UI focusses now on devices to achieve the cleanest UI for the different connection types QR, USB, Bluetooth, File, and Share via Chat&Sync together with @design-rrr PR #639
Support for MK5 and Trezor Safe 7 PR #596, PR #598

ul.li: 30% faster animated QR codes for quicker scanning
Chat messages now have a send status icon
Added 🇮🇳 Tamil language and more translation improvements
Increase loading speed of transactions with >200 outputs
Use up to date min relay fee to warn user about a too low fee rate https://github.com/andreasgriffin/bitcoin-safe/pull/590
Added zooming for the balance chart https://github.com/andreasgriffin/bitcoin-safe/pull/492
Seamless update functionality on windows and easier updates on MacOS and Linux https://github.com/andreasgriffin/bitcoin-safe/pull/513
Notifications history now available from the tray icon https://github.com/andreasgriffin/bitcoin-safe/pull/493
bug fixes and small UI improvements
Thanks to the bdk team and @rustaceanrob
Huge thanks to @design-rrr for design and UX support
Choice between BTC and ₿ in the UI
UTXO based coin selection is supplemented by address based coin selection directly from the address list
Fully configurable P2P listening connections for instant transaction notifications

description.p: Thanks to @design-rrr for relentless design support!

ul.li: New Multi-Tool: Sign and verify messages
Back button in Tx screens for easier navigation
Donations are now possible via BTCPay
Copy multiple addresses directly from the context menu in the addresses tab
CI/CD: Compact Block filter syncing is automatically tested additional to electrum server backend
Switching network settings easier due to 1-click restarts
Improved menu structure. Thanks to @design-rrr for the redesign
Transactions and PSBTs can now be exported as PDF
Bug fixes. Thanks to @design-rrr for finding one
🧩 Compact Block Filters — optional lightweight mode for faster, more private syncing without any central server. Awesome work from @rustaceanrob on the CBF client.
🌐 Offline Wallet Functionality — full wallet state is now persisted locally, so your wallet remains fully usable even without an internet connection.
📈 Wallet Chart Plugin — visualize your wallet’s history and export all transaction and UTXO data as GraphML.
🪟🐧 Perfect Reproducibility — fully reproducible builds for both Windows and Linux.

description.p: Thanks to @design-rrr for relentless design support!
💡 Wallet Design Enhancements Biggest UX upgrade yet — faster, cleaner, smarter. Fantastic work by @design-rrr
💱 Bitcoin ↔ Fiat Conversion Live conversion support for all fiat currencies throughout the app.
⚡ Instant Transaction Notifications Stay up to date with real-time alerts for Bitcoin transactions as they’re relayed across the P2P network.

ul.li: Opt-out by default for new users

description.p: 🔓 Faster Wallet Unlocking When multiple wallets share the same encryption password, you’ll only need to enter it once.

ul.li: Additional tooltips and clearer error messages
Plus many small bug fixes and UX tweaks
Ability to save non-broadcasted transactions in the wallet https://github.com/andreasgriffin/bitcoin-safe/pull/163
This also enables partial offline usage, since all transactions are restored on startup
Scan addresses ahead to detect own (but yet unrevealed) addresses https://github.com/andreasgriffin/bitcoin-safe/pull/169
New languages: 🇮🇷 Persian (Farsi) - فارسی , 🇵🇱 Polish - Polski, 🇪🇸 Catalan - Català
thanks to Ziya_Sadr and his video walkthrough

description.p: Lots of existing features were not mentioned above, so please check out:
Import my public key and verify the signature with:

ul.li: fixes for UI issue that opened multiple address windows

description.p: Lots of existing features were not mentioned above, so please check out:
Import my public key and verify the signature with:

ul.li: fix for ssl certificate issue, that prevented full blockchain synchronization

description.p: Lots of existing features were not mentioned above, so please check out:
Import my public key and verify the signature with:

ul.li: added pyright as secondary static type checking

description.p: Lots of existing features were not mentioned above, so please check out:
Import my public key and verify the signature with:

ul.li: 🎨 Awesome redesign by @design-rrr of Chart 📊, Quick Receive ⚡, Icons ❤, and Mempool Preview 🟩
📈 Interactive chart (clicking jumps to transaction and selected transactions are highlighted)
🧩 Cluster unconfirmed transactions so that parents/children are next to each other 🔗
⚙️ Customizable columns for all tables (optional view: Txid 🆔, Address index 🏷️, and more)
🐞 Bug fixes and other improvements across the board 🛠️✨

description.p: Lots of existing features were not mentioned above, so please check out:
Import my public key and verify the signature with:

ul.li: ✨ Expanded QR SignMessage Compatibility: SignMessage now supports all QR-UR-compatible hardware signers, including SpecterDIY, KeyStone, Passport, and Jade (additional to previous supported Coldcard Q)
📥 Wallet Import via QR: Added the ability to import wallet-export-files via QR code, ensuring compatibility with Keystone’s latest firmware (2.0.6).
Descriptor UI: Improved clarity in the descriptor interface for importing formats, making the import process more intuitive
Added import formats: Allow import of descriptors without derivation path (Sparrow format)
Multisig Wallet Export: Multisig wallet exports now revert to the legacy (Coldcard) format, even for Q, ensuring the wallet name is included.
Quick Receive Scrollbar (Mac): Resolved scrollbar display issues in the Quick Receive view on macOS.
fixed install issue with the deb file

description.p: Lots of existing features were not mentioned above, so please check out:
Import my public key and verify the signature with:

ul.li: Added Address poisoning detection and warning
Nostr sync&chat alias now also appears in share menu of the TX/PSBT
better error handling, if USB connection is interrupted
fixed fee rate display (fee amount unaffected)
deb file: Clean install directory to ensure clean (un)install

description.p: Lots of existing features were not mentioned above, so please check out:
Import my public key and verify the signature with:
👥 You can now assign names to participants in Sync&Chat
🛠️ Fixed MacOS .dmg files – working again 📷 Improved camera defaults – better recognition for bright hardware signer screens 🧅 Fixed onion address handling when using a Tor proxy
Lots of existing features were not mentioned above, so please check out:
Import my public key and verify the signature with:

ul.li: ⚡ Insanely performant QR scanning in Linux, Mac, Windows
📲 Added message signing via USB and QR (Coldcard Q rocks )

description.p: Lots of existing features were not mentioned above, so please check out:
Import my public key and verify the signature with:

ul.li: xpub import from USB signers for different accounts
Fixed bug that could prevent usage of Jade on testnet

description.p: Lots of existing features were not mentioned above, so please check out:
Import my public key and verify the signature with:

ul.li: Added languages: 🇲🇲 Burmese - မြန်မာ, 🇰🇷 Korean - 한국어

description.p: Lots of existing features were not mentioned above, so please check out:
Import my public key and verify the signature with:

ul.li: Fixes for UI bugs and CSV Drag&Drop in lists
bitbox02: Added initial device setup option "restore from seed" without needing vendor software
Jade: Bugfix for unlocking a newly initialized device
Stricter tests for clean wallet shutdowns

ul.li: Fixes for UI bugs and CSV Drag&Drop in lists
bitbox02: Added initial device setup option "restore from seed" without needing vendor software
Jade: Bugfix for unlocking a newly initialized device
Stricter tests for clean wallet shutdowns

ul.li: UI: Dark-mode improvements and matching icons
UI: added additional way to set address category through context menu

ul.li: UI: Dark-mode improvements and matching icons

description.p: Lots of existing features were not mentioned above, so please check out:
Import my public key and verify the signature with:
Install and run on Mac, Linux, or Windows

ul.li: Fixes missing USB (HWI) support in Windows and Mac builds
Added delete coin category (via right click context menu) additionally to the "drag to delete button" method

description.p: Lots of existing features were not mentioned above, so please check out:
Import my public key and verify the signature with:
Install and run on Mac, Linux, or Windows

ul.li: Full support for all major hardware signers Coldcard, Q, Bitbox02, Blockstream Jade, Trezor, Foundation Passport, Keystone, Ledger, Specter DIY including hardware signer instructions
Balance Statement: PDF export of your current address balances to PDF (preview)
USB Tools: interact with your USB hardware signer (PSBT sign, sign message, display address, ...)
QR Scanner: Scan and decode any Bitcoin QR code; full support for BBQr and UR
Packaged binaries now for all platforms: Windows, MacOSX, and Linux
Transaction diagram -- The graphical wallet explorer: Navigate trough transactions by clicking on inputs and outputs (preview)
Sync & Chat: Label Synchronization, backup, and Multi-party Multisig Collaboration can now be enabled in the last wallet setup wizard step (you can choose your own relay) (preview, preview)
PSBT Creation: Beautiful fee selection, by clicking on mempool blocks (preview)
